steps.title: Use the two points
steps.content: The graph contains $(0,0)$ and $(1,10)$. Because the relationship is linear, those two points determine the whole function.

steps.title: Fit the line in Desmos
steps.content: Enter $x_1=[0,1]$ and $y_1=[0,10]$, then type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=10$ and $b=0$, so $$h(x)=10x.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A is correct. The other choices either add an intercept of $10$ or use the reciprocal slope, so they do not pass through both given points.
